title: stelis coeliaca
intro: Stelis coeliaca, a type of orchid native to tropical America, is a flowering plant that grows in the wild and is also cultivated for its medicinal properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its roots, which are known to contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis coeliaca include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis coeliaca are typically made by drying and extracting the roots, and are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
